content: Functional testing of Hash Calculator tool (validate SHA256 & HMAC outputs, clipboard functionality)
Functional testing of Seed Analyzer tool (validate entropy calculation, analysis display)
Functional testing of Real-time Monitor modal (open/close, script copy functionality)
Build extensible Provably Fair API framework in backend (create verification engine interface, provider registry structure)
Update /api/verify/provably-fair endpoint with proper structure (accepts provider, game_type, payload; returns detailed results)
Create placeholder verification modules for each game type with informative responses (ready for algorithm injection)
Add comprehensive data-testid attributes to all tool components for automated testing
Test complete verification flow: Verify page → select game/provider → submit → get response from new API
